equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-06-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.74
description: New daily signal for 2026-06-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.74/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-06-29, the score printed 17.74/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
